calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: William P. Lamb, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

John Dresslar, Esq. for Plaintiff: Aurora Loan Services. LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness Alex Dabit was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Blanca Pena

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 2240 Cayuga Ave., San Francisco, CA 94112.
No money judgemtn.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
